note: V3-SEC-52 unconsented-cron consent allowlist (source of truth for scripts/check-cron.mjs). A scheduled trigger declared in apps/api/wrangler.toml [triggers] may exist ONLY after a human consents to it here. `crons` is the machine-checked string allowlist; `consents` records the human-gate provenance. Declaring/consenting the cron here is reversible config; the DEPLOY that actually starts the trigger (resident token consumption) remains a human gate.

consents.purpose: C5 K3 monthly economy batch: KRM-03 karma recovery / KRM-11 fork+vote platinum rebate / KRM-12 dry-axis mercy mint / MKT-04 auto-good ratings / MKT-10 fee_unpaid monthly Fibonacci penalty. Daily trigger; real work branches on the 25th (RECOVERY_BASE_DAY).
